name: Crisp Bacon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crisp, then chop it fine.
2. Sift together the flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder.
3. Add the chopped bacon to the sifted dry ingredients.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg, milk, and bacon fat until well combined.
5. Pour the wet mixture into buttered muffin tins, filling each one about one-third full.
6. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 15-20 minutes.
